TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_Tibet, title = Kari_Tibet, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_Tibet} }

S.FORM: Kari Tibet uxe de kesun daha Kari Bod Skad we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Tibet, kari qnlhangan na Cikuku uri. 60000 kana hei ka tnkari Tibet. Alang skari Kari Tibet Cikuku Tibet Dndulan Kari Kari Amdo Kari Kham Kari √ú-Tsang Kari Lhasa Patis Wano 30 patis ka ga daha dooyun saya. Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Hengak Laqi Duma kari Tibet Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak == Patis pnyahan ==
S.PHON: ka…ĺi tib…ôt ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi bod skad w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq m…ôniq tib…ôt, ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na ¶ikuku u…ĺi. ***** kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi tib…ôt. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tib…ôt ¶ikuku tib…ôt dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amdo ka…ĺi kńßam ka…ĺi *-tsaŇč ka…ĺi lńßasa patis wano ** patis ka ga dańßa doojun saja. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu ńß…ôŇčak laqi duma ka…ĺi tib…ôt ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak == patis pnjańßan ==
S.FORM: Kari Tibet uxe de kesun daha Kari Bod Skad we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Tibet, kari qnlhangan na Cikuku uri. 60000 kana hei ka tnkari Tibet. Alang skari Kari Tibet Cikuku Tibet Dndulan Kari Kari Amdo Kari Kham Kari √ú-Tsang Kari Lhasa Patis Wano 30 patis ka ga daha dooyun saya. Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Hengak Laqi Duma kari Tibet Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak == Patis pnyahan ==
S.PHON: ka…ĺi tib…ôt ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi bod skad w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq m…ôniq tib…ôt, ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na ¶ikuku u…ĺi. ***** kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi tib…ôt. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tib…ôt ¶ikuku tib…ôt dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amdo ka…ĺi kńßam ka…ĺi *-tsaŇč ka…ĺi lńßasa patis wano ** patis ka ga dańßa doojun saja. pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu ńß…ôŇčak laqi duma ka…ĺi tib…ôt ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak == patis pnjańßan ==
